info.title: ZenHub REST API
info.description: ZenHub's legacy REST API for managing issues, epics, boards, milestones, dependencies, and release reports. Note: This API is deprecated in favor of the GraphQL API.

get.description: Get the data for a specific issue including estimate, pipeline, and epic status.
Get the events for an issue, sorted by creation time, most recent first.

post.description: Moves an issue between Pipelines in a Workspace.

post.summary: Move an Issue Between Pipelines in the oldest Workspace
post.description: Moves an issue between Pipelines for a repository in your oldest Workspace.

put.description: Set the estimate value for an issue.

get.description: Get all Epics for a repository.
Get the data for an Epic issue including estimates, pipeline, and child issues.

parameters.name: epic_id
parameters.description: GitHub issue number of the Epic

post.summary: Convert an Epic to an Issue
post.description: Converts an Epic back to a regular issue.
Converts an issue to an Epic, along with any issues that should be part of it.

post.summary: Add or Remove Issues from an Epic
post.description: Bulk add or remove issues to an Epic.

get.summary: Get ZenHub Workspaces for a repository
get.description: Gets all Workspaces containing the specified repository.

get.summary: Get a ZenHub Board for a repository
get.description: Get ZenHub Board data for a repository within a Workspace.

get.summary: Get the oldest ZenHub Board for a repository
get.description: Get the oldest ZenHub board for a repository.

post.description: Set the start date for a milestone.

get.description: Get the start date for a milestone.
Fetches all dependencies associated to the given repository.

post.description: Creates a dependency between two issues.

delete.description: Removes a dependency between two issues.

post.description: Create a new release report for a repository.

get.description: Get a release report by ID.

get.summary: Get Release Reports for a Repository
get.description: Get all release reports for a repository.

post.summary: Add a Repository to a Release Report
post.description: Add a repository to an existing release report.

delete.summary: Remove a Repository from a Release Report
delete.description: Remove a repository from a release report.

get.summary: Get all Issues in a Release Report
get.description: Get all issues associated with a release report.

patch.summary: Add or Remove Issues from a Release Report
patch.description: Add or remove issues from a release report.
